description_long: This is a classic red fire hydrant with a cylindrical body and a domed top, featuring a prominent central outlet and two side outlets for hose connections. The hydrant is mounted on a circular, textured base that appears to be made of concrete or cast iron. The top of the hydrant has a hexagonal operating nut, which is used to open the valve and release water. The surface is painted a bright red, with metallic silver or gray accents on the outlets and top nut, and some visible weathering and wear. There are no visible chains attached to the caps, and no manufacturer markings or logos are apparent. The hydrant is designed to be highly visible and durable, suitable for installation along streets, sidewalks, or in public parks.
description: A bright red, cylindrical fire hydrant with three hose outlets, a domed top, and metallic accents, mounted on a round base. The surface shows some weathering and is free of visible chains or markings.
description_view_0: This view highlights the central outlet and the domed top with the operating nut, showing the hydrant's main face and one side outlet.
description_view_1: This view displays both side outlets symmetrically, with the cylindrical body and round base clearly visible.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, showing the opposite side outlet and the main outlet from a different angle.
description_view_3: This rear view focuses on the back of the hydrant, showing the main outlet cap and both side outlets, with the base and top dome visible.
